zh.lifeSummary: 當Mehitable Woodward於1677年11月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Peter Woodward Jr40歲，母親Mehitable Fisher29歲。她於大約1698年10月23日與Samuel Herrick在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1739年6月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦普雷斯頓享年61歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mehitable Woodward于1677年11月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆时，她的父亲Peter Woodward Jr40岁，母亲Mehitable Fisher29岁。她于大约1698年10月23日与Samuel Herrick在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1739年6月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦普雷斯頓享年61岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

en.lifeSummary: When Mehitable Woodward was born on 17 November 1677, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Peter Woodward Jr, was 40 and her mother, Mehitable Fisher, was 29. She married Samuel Herrick about 23 October 1698, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 June 1739, in Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mehitable Woodward est née le 17 novembre 1677, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Peter Woodward Jr, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mehitable Fisher, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Herrick environ 23 octobre 1698, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 juin 1739, à Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mehitable Woodward am 17. November 1677 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Woodward Jr 40 und ihre Mutter Mehitable Fisher 29. Sie hat um 23. Oktober 1698 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Samuel Herrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. Juni 1739 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Woodward è nata il il 17 novembre 1677 nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Peter Woodward Jr, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mehitable Fisher, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Herrick circa 23 ottobre 1698, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 giugno 1739, nel Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mehitable Woodwardが1677年11月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで生まれた時，父Peter Woodward Jrは40歳，母Mehitable Fisherは29歳であった。約1698年10月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでSamuel Herrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1739年6月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンプレストンで61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mehitable Woodward(이)가 1677년 11월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Woodward Jr(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mehitable Fisher(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1698년 10월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Samuel Herrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1739년 6월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리에 묻혔다.

pt.17 November 1677–13 June 1739: 17 de novembro de 1677–13 de junho de 1739
pt.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
pt.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Woodward nasceu em 17 de novembro de 1677, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Peter Woodward Jr, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mehitable Fisher, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Herrick aproximadamente 23 de outubro de 1698, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de junho de 1739, em Preston, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Coventry, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mehitable Woodward родилась 17 ноября 1677 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Peter Woodward Jr было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mehitable Fisher, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Herrick около 23 октября 1698 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 июня 1739 г. в местности престон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mehitable Woodward nació el 17 de noviembre de 1677, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Peter Woodward Jr, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mehitable Fisher, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Samuel Herrick aproximadamente 23 de octubre de 1698, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de junio de 1739, en Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
